scripts.contract:mock: echo 'Mocks are in-process (MSW) — run `pnpm dev:web` with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MOCKING=enabled (default in apps/web dev).'

pnpm.comment: esbuild ships its platform binary as an optional dep; pnpm resolves it at runtime, so the postinstall validator (which collides across co-installed esbuild versions on Windows) is unnecessary and skipped.
